requirements.summary: Create a product catalog page displaying products with images, names, prices, and stock status in a mobile-optimized grid layout
acceptanceCriteria: Products display in a responsive grid on mobile and tablet devices
Each product card shows image, name, price, and availability status
Grid layout adapts to different screen sizes

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook to fetch all products from backend using getAllProducts method
Create product card component displaying image (using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL()), name, price, and stock status with Tailwind CSS responsive styling

Create product catalog page with responsive grid layout using ProductCard components, wire generated product images from frontend/public/assets/generated/product-phone.dim_400x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/product-laptop.dim_400x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/product-headphones.dim_400x400.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/product-watch.dim_400x400.png as fallback placeholders
Add React Router route for /products path pointing to ProductCatalogPage component

requirements.summary: Create product detail page showing full product information, larger image, description, and quantity selector
acceptanceCriteria: Users can tap a product from the catalog to view details
Detail page displays full product description and specifications
Quantity selector allows users to choose purchase quantity

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook to fetch single product by ID using getProduct backend method
Create quantity selector component with increment/decrement buttons and numeric input using shadcn/ui Button components
Create product detail page displaying full product information, larger image using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL(), description, category, and QuantitySelector component with add to cart functionality
Add React Router route for /products/:id path pointing to ProductDetailPage component
Wrap ProductCard with Link component to navigate to /products/:id on click

requirements.summary: Implement shopping cart functionality allowing users to add products, adjust quantities, and view cart total
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add products to cart from product detail page
Cart persists items and quantities during session
Cart displays running total of all items
Users can modify quantities or remove items from cart

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks for cart operations: useGetCart (fetches cart via getCart), useAddToCart (mutation for addToCart), useRemoveFromCart (mutation for removeFromCart), with proper cache invalidation. Use the authorization component to ensure users are authenticated before accessing cart.
Create cart item component displaying product info, quantity with inline adjustment controls, item subtotal, and remove button

Create shopping cart page listing CartItem components with calculated total amount and proceed to checkout button, wire generated cart icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/cart-icon.dim_128x128.png for empty cart state
Add React Router route for /cart path pointing to CartPage component
Add add-to-cart button that calls useAddToCart mutation with selected quantity
Create cart badge component displaying cart item count, integrate with useGetCart hook for real-time updates

requirements.summary: Build checkout flow allowing users to review cart, enter shipping information, and place orders
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout page displays cart summary with all items and total
Form collects shipping name, address, phone number
Users can confirm and submit orders
Order confirmation is displayed after successful submission

file_operations.description: Create React Query mutation hook for checkout using backend checkout method, returns order ID on success. Use the authorization component to verify user authentication before allowing checkout.
Create shipping information form component collecting name, address, and phone number using shadcn/ui Form and Input components with validation
Create checkout page displaying cart summary, ShippingForm component, total amount, and confirm order button that triggers useCheckout mutation
Create order confirmation page displaying success message, order ID, and order details, wire generated success icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/order-success.dim_128x128.png
Add React Router routes for /checkout and /order-confirmation/:orderId paths
Add proceed to checkout button that navigates to /checkout route when cart has items

requirements.summary: Create order history page displaying past orders with order details, status, and items purchased
acceptanceCriteria: Users can view list of their previous orders
Each order shows date, status, total amount
Users can tap to view detailed order information
Order status is clearly indicated with visual indicators

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks: useGetUserOrders (fetches getUserOrders) and useGetOrder (fetches single order via getOrder). Use the authorization component to ensure users are authenticated.
Create order status badge component with color-coded visual indicators for pending, shipped, delivered, and cancelled statuses using Tailwind CSS
Create order card component displaying order ID, date, OrderStatusBadge, total amount, and clickable link to order details
Create order history page listing OrderCard components for all user orders with empty state handling
Create order detail page displaying full order information including items, quantities, shipping address, status, and total using useGetOrder hook
Add React Router routes for /orders and /orders/:orderId paths

requirements.summary: Implement product search and category filtering to help users find products quickly
acceptanceCriteria: Search bar allows text-based product search
Category filters narrow product listings
Search and filter results update catalog display in real-time
Backend provides efficient query methods for search and filtering

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook to search products using searchProducts backend method with debounced search term
Create React Query hook to filter products by category using getProductsByCategory backend method
Create search bar component with input field and search icon using shadcn/ui Input component, implementing debounced search
Create category filter component with category buttons or dropdown using shadcn/ui Select component
Integrate SearchBar and CategoryFilter components, add state management for active search and filter, conditionally use useProductSearch or useProductsByCategory hooks based on active filters

requirements.summary: Add inventory management capability for resellers to track stock levels and receive low-stock alerts
acceptanceCriteria: Stock quantity decrements when orders are placed
Out-of-stock products are clearly marked and cannot be ordered
Dashboard shows current inventory levels
Visual indicators highlight low-stock products

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook to fetch low stock products using getLowStockProducts backend method with configurable threshold
Create stock indicator component showing visual badge for in-stock, low-stock, and out-of-stock states with color coding

Create inventory dashboard page displaying all products with stock levels, StockIndicator components, and highlighted low-stock items using useLowStockProducts hook. Use the authorization component to restrict access to authenticated users only.
Add React Router route for /inventory path pointing to InventoryDashboardPage component
Integrate StockIndicator component to display stock status on product cards
Disable add-to-cart functionality when product is out of stock, display out-of-stock message with StockIndicator

requirements.summary: Render generated product images as static assets in the frontend public directory
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated
Product catalog and detail pages reference images from static assets
Images load correctly on all device sizes

file_operations.description: Create utility functions to handle image paths, fallback logic for missing images, and responsive image sizing. Reference generated images: frontend/public/assets/generated/product-phone.dim_400x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/product-laptop.dim_400x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/product-headphones.dim_400x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/product-watch.dim_400x400.png
Create reusable product image component that handles ExternalBlob URLs and static asset fallbacks with responsive sizing and lazy loading
Replace direct image rendering with ProductImage component
Replace direct image rendering with ProductImage component for larger detail view
